text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Sweep Tosho brings me along on a
search for new magic ideas, when...

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho! I just thought of a new spell! Would
you mind taking a look at it?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: A new spell? But this is just a letter!

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
It's not just a letter! I put an enchantment on it.
When you expose it to a life source, words
appear!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Well, we can't just sit here! Let's go, Familiar!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
...Ergh, why?! No matter how much light I shine on
it or how much I beg Sylph, nothing shows up!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Light nurtures life, wind carries seeds... They're
both life sources! I don't know what the heck else
w—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she says that, a somewhat familiar woman
walks right up to us.
choice_data_list: Hey, it's the woman from earlier...

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I'm so thirsty. I think I'll have myself a sip of
water from my trusty water bottle!

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text: Gulp, gulp, gulp... Phew! Just what the doctor ordered! Water really is the source of all life!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: The source of all... That's it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho rushes to the river and splashes
water on the letter.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Ooh! There's letters! Letters are appearing!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Um... "I'm always rooting for you. Good luck in
your next race!"

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe she went through all the trouble of
writing me a magic letter!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Talk about dedication! That's what a true fan of
the genius Magical Girl Sweepy looks like!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
I'm not about to be outdone! I need to cast an
awesome spell back and show her just how
different our powers are!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Okay, Familiar! Let's head back and get studying!
Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Woman A
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, she's going to cast me a spell back! I'm
glad I thought so hard about my letter!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho seems enthusiastic. The love of her
fans really might be its own magic.
